If we have multiple replay folders, the first 'allow floder access' question shows up, but not the following after pressing 'decode all'
Add a 'decode cancel button' to the TopRow - since can start it from here, we should also be able to stop it there.
Add header line 'Latest Replay' on top of Laterst Replay on Home page.
In src\common\dsstats.weblib\Replays\ReplayComponent.razor this is dangerouse, since we also use the component for the server (Blazor server), we need a better way to identify the PWA (and MAUI) app:
            @if (OperatingSystem.IsWindows() || OperatingSystem.IsBrowser())
				{
					<div class="col-auto">
						<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light"
								@onclick="() => _replayHelper.ShowFileName = !_replayHelper.ShowFileName">
							@(_replayHelper.ShowFileName ? "Hide" : "Show") File Name
						</button>
					</div>
				}
